summary: Added a ### Fixed entry under ## Unreleased in CHANGELOG.md describing the annotation screen mismatch bug fix; README.md and other docs do not describe cross-screen preview behavior at the affected level of detail and required no changes.

files_updated.change: Added ### Fixed section under ## Unreleased with user-facing description of the annotation screen mismatch bug fix (live preview priority, saved-screenshot swap on annotation focus, cross-screen pin elimination).
